name: XState Machine Formalized
description: Any XState state machine definition must be formalized into IML before the component using it is edited.
rationale: XState machines define critical application logic. Formalizing them into IML enables exhaustive verification of all state transitions, guard conditions, and event handling — something unit tests alone cannot guarantee.

examples.fails: EditFile(AuthFlow.tsx) with XState machine changes but no prior formalization
